title: hieracium murorum subsp. integratulum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. integratulum, commonly known as wall hawkweed, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, wall hawkweed has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of wall hawkweed include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Wall hawkweed can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
